race.comment: Tricky little sprint. ZOUPER FUND (2) ran well first up at Sandown Hillside over 1000m behind the speedy Bazaball Rewarded, boxing on nicely for fourth over a trip short of his best. He'd prefer even a bit further than this but can hold a spot from the inside gate and be strong late. LUNA CAT (6) broke through for a deserved win here last time off the back of consistent form. She's racing as well as ever and looks a strong chance of repeating the dose. MARKDEL (4) got home strongly when last seen at Flemington and comes back a notch in grade here. Not sure where he gets to from the draw but look for him late. Wary of the resuming STEALTH OF NIGHT (8) who will be better over further but did some nice things last campaign in good races. NAVAL ACADEMY (3) had excuses fresh then battled here last time. Peaks now and is good enough.
